mapper.sql: id, kb_id, title, user_id, message_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_chat_session (id, kb_id, title, user_id, message_count) VALUES (#{id}, #{kbId}, #{title}, COALESCE(#{userId}, 'anonymous'), COALESCE(#{messageCount}, 0))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_chat_session WHERE kb_id = #{kbId}
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chat_session SET message_count = message_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
